name: @lib/qr-scanner
description: QR/barcode decoding for the browser, via wasm bindings over the rxing crate.

scripts.build: cargo build --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown -p qr-scanner && wasm-bindgen ../../../target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/qr_scanner.wasm --out-dir dist --out-name qr_scanner --target web
